title: Consolidated Three-Part Strategy Report
content: Combines commercial analysis of paths to $200 from existing digital assets, emergency funding outreach messages for infrastructure recovery, and repository validation report for Human Flourishing Frameworks project. Top monetization paths: repo/RAG cleanup sprint ($199), local-first AI/MCP audit ($199), founder report pack ($199-$299). Emergency funding addresses -$1000 account balance from misconfigured token usage. HFF validation found 14 issues vs claimed 54% convergence, 4 HIGH severity missing surfaces.
operator_boundary: Financial claims require operator verification before publication
